topics.title: Artie's Mustache and Radio Transitions
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Artie's new mustache, personal fitness, vacation experiences in Mexico and the Caribbean, and listener feedback concerning the transition to satellite radio.

topics.title: Satellite Radio vs. Terrestrial Radio
topics.summary: The studio discusses the advantages of satellite radio over terrestrial stations, focusing on the lack of commercials and the transition of listeners to Sirius.

topics.title: Dinner with Barbara Walters
topics.summary: The studio discusses a dinner hosted by a local official that included Barbara Walters and the Duchess of York, while also touching on satellite radio promotions and listener feedback.

topics.title: Radio Show Production and Media Disputes
topics.summary: The studio discusses various segments including a controversial promo, upcoming guest appearances, the legal complexities of reclaiming past broadcast tapes from Viacom, and an anecdote regarding a past interview with Henry Hill.

topics.title: Fan Interaction and Musical Segments
topics.summary: The studio features a phone call with a dedicated fan from Phoenix, a discussion regarding the musical career of Andy Deck, and a comparison between a porn star's voice and that of actress Shirley Temple Black.

topics.title: Radio Show Interactions and Studio Environment
topics.summary: The studio features a series of listener calls regarding traffic tickets and personal experiences, followed by a discussion on the transition to satellite radio, workplace conditions at their previous station, and various comedic bits.

topics.title: Radio Show Segments and Comedy Bits
topics.summary: The studio features a series of comedy sketches, prank calls involving high-pitched voices, and discussions regarding upcoming radio segments and guest appearances.

topics.title: Drug Prescription Case and Studio Banter
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding a man sentenced for drug trafficking due to excessive prescriptions, followed by segments involving listener interactions, studio jokes about prizes, and internal discussions regarding upcoming shows and guest appearances.

topics.title: Danny Bonaducci Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts Danny Bonaducci to discuss his transition to satellite radio, his physical recovery from injuries, and his plans for the upcoming week.

topics.title: Danny Bonaducci and Howard Stern Collaboration
topics.summary: The studio features Danny Bonaducci discussing his television career, personal life in Mexico, and the introduction of a new co-host for his radio show.

topics.title: Danny Bonaducci's Radio Career and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio features Danny Bonaducci discussing his transition to satellite radio, his experiences with steroid use, and various interactions with celebrities and colleagues.

topics.title: Hollywood Celebrity Preferences
topics.summary: The studio discusses a survey regarding which Hollywood actresses men would prefer as girlfriends, specifically mentioning Angelina Jolie.

topics.title: Celebrity Attractiveness and Pop Culture Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses various celebrities' physical appeal, the media coverage of Oprah Winfrey and James Frey, and an anecdote regarding David Blaine at a private party.

topics.title: Climate Change and Somali Piracy
topics.summary: The studio discusses the Bush administration's stance on global warming, the threat of Somali pirates to the U.S. Navy, and a listener's request regarding childhood tapes.

topics.title: Media Coverage and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legal troubles of a local figure, the reporting on Bob Woodruff’s injuries in Iraq, and various media personalities.

topics.title: Middle East Policy and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion on Middle Eastern geopolitics following the Iraq War, followed by segments on reality television stars, award show highlights, and upcoming guest appearances.
